mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_thread(board_id, user_id, title, content, view_count, reply_count, is_top, is_essence, status, last_reply_time, created_at) VALUES(#{boardId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.status = 1

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.board_id = #{boardId} AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.is_top DESC, t.last_reply_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_thread SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_thread SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_thread SET last_reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
